zh.heroTagline: 物理智能开源数据平台
zh.heroDesc:
全球首个AI自主决策自然实验室启航，
L4-L5全自动驾驶挑战张家界天门山九十九道弯，让AI在大自然中理解物理世界
zh.aboutText:
在天门山 99 道弯,Hitch Open 正创造自动驾驶的 AlphaGo 时刻。

10.77 公里的天路,1100 米的落差,99 个弯道——
F1 传奇车手 Romain Dumas 曾以 7'36" 刷新人类极限。

而今年,清华大学 AI 赛车在无 GPS、低能见度、湿滑赛面的极限环境中,
以 16'10"838 全程自动驾驶登顶,
让 AI 首次在真实世界完成

的闭环。

这一刻,物理智能的引擎被彻底点燃。
zh.recordsTeam1: 法国 F1 赛车手 Romain Dumas
zh.recordsTeam2: 清华大学 极限竞速战队
zh.missionTitle: Hitch Open以竞速之名,开启物理智能时代
zh.missionSubtitle: Hitch Open世界AI竞速锦标赛,以真实极限环境验证人工智能的感知与决策能力,推动AI从虚拟智能迈向物理智能。
zh.trackTitle: 2025 决赛场地 - 天门山 99 道弯
zh.trackDescription: ，是全球最极限、最壮观的山路之一。大道两侧绝壁千仞，空谷幽深，180度急弯此消彼长。这里将成为AI竞速技术的终极试炼场，重新定义AI竞速的极限。
zh.trackImageDesc: ，是全球最极限的山路之一。全长逾10公里，180度急弯此消彼长。这里将成为AI竞速技术的终极试炼场，重新定义AI竞速的极限。

en.heroDesc:
The world's first AI autonomous decision-making natural laboratory launches,
L4-L5 fully autonomous driving challenges Zhangjiajie Tianmen Mountain's 99 bends, enabling AI to understand the physical world in nature
en.aboutTitle: The AlphaGo Moment of Physical Intelligence
en.aboutText:
At Tianmen Mountain's 99 bends, Hitch Open is creating autonomous driving's AlphaGo moment.

10.77 kilometers of skyward road, 1100 meters of elevation drop, 99 curves—
F1 legend Romain Dumas set the human limit at 7'36".

This year, Tsinghua University's AI racing car reached the summit with fully autonomous driving in 16'10"838,
under extreme conditions of no GPS, low visibility, and slippery surfaces,
achieving AI's first closed loop of "perception—decision—action" in the real world.

This moment, the engine of physical intelligence was fully ignited.
en.missionTitle: Hitch Open: Racing Forward to Physical Intelligence Era
en.missionSubtitle: The Hitch Open World AI Racing Championship validates AI perception and decision-making capabilities in real extreme environments, driving AI from virtual to physical intelligence.
en.trackSubtitle: The Ultimate Challenge for AI Racing
en.trackDescription: The Tianmen Mountain 99 Bends, known as the "Road to Heaven", is one of the most extreme and spectacular mountain roads in the world. With cliffs towering on both sides and deep valleys, the 180-degree sharp turns appear one after another. This will become the ultimate testing ground for AI racing technology, redefining the limits of AI racing.
en.trackImageDesc: The Tianmen Mountain 99 Bends, known as the "Road to Heaven", is one of the most extreme mountain roads in the world. Stretching over 10 kilometers with 180-degree sharp turns appearing one after another, this will become the ultimate testing ground for AI racing technology, redefining the limits of AI racing.
